title: Vanilla Weapons PLUS 香草武器擴充
description:
A Datapack adds multiple new, Vanilla, unique weapons to Vanilla Minecraft.

新增多樣化、原版化、獨特武器的資料包。
body:
# Vanilla Weapons PLUS 香草武器擴充
**You HAVE to download the Resources Pack for the best experience, go to Versions, look for your version and download the required RP file. 下載資源包才能獲得最好的遊戲體驗，到 Versions 分頁並下載對應版本的 RP 檔案。**

**Choose a language between English and Traditional Chinese before downloading! 下載前先確認下載的語言版本是否正確！**
![Vanilla Weapons PLUS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93ad4ffbdc82e877f46d45693945bf013c6c7f8d.png)
Most completed **Weapon Extension Datapack** in Minecraft 1.21!
1.21 **最完善的武器擴充資料包**！

Are **Original Vanilla weapons too boring** to you?
覺得**原版武器了無新意**嗎？

Is it **too quickly to the top of damage**?
覺得**太快達到傷害值的巔峰**了嗎？

Need **harder and more gift challenges**?
覺得**需要更多具有豐厚獎賞的挑戰**嗎？

## Vanilla Weapons Designs 貼合原版的武器設計
![New Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04891daa50939122d8f0b50360a7f5cc1c531934.png)
* We haven't done all of these :)

We add a lot of new weapons
我們新增了大量的新武器

You'll be able to collect new content during the original Minecraft gameplay.
使你在挑戰新目標的過程中也能取得原版內不會有的新內容

## No Mods, no plug-ins 無模組、無插件

Drag the file in, and play
只需要將檔案拖進即可遊玩

Works in Multi-player, enjoy powerful weapon battles with friends!
多人遊戲可用，讓你與朋友們享受強大武器的戰鬥，爽度破表

## Small and light 小體積、效能需求極低

Right-click detection is completed and balanced
右鍵偵測的系統完善而平衡

Friendly to bad computer players
對電腦效能不足的玩家也有很好的支援性

Wiki:
內容連結文件：
[Wiki (Google Docs)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Nc_ZSxdp_7VlRa7F2PsZRdXhte7FyQBgssW5lshiQYs/edit)
## Authors: 作者：

## Installing 安裝步驟
1. Put the DP into the .minecraft/saves/[The map you'd like to install VWP] folder
   將 DP 檔放入 .minecraft/saves/[你要安裝香草武器擴充的地圖] 資料夾
2. **Attention that .minecraft folder can also be the folder you run Minecraft. If VWP is not working, please check the launcher and see where your game folder is.**
   **注意，.minecraft 資料夾可以是任何你運行 Minecraft 用的資料夾，如果香草武器擴充沒有運作，請確認遊戲啟動器執行檔的資料夾正確位置。**
3. Enjoy the pack!
   玩到爽！

**Manager: 主要製作人：**

* Vicxia 維克夏

**Advisors: 顧問：**

* Chenchen 宸宸

* Sharkary 李鯊克
